title: Shingeki no Kaiji  OP / Opening - "Guren no Yumiya" - Linked Horizon
description:
'Itou Kaiji. What is that thing in your right hand?'
'A tissue box, sir. I saw it in the bathroom and it looked amazing.' 
'So you stole it? Why? Why would you choose to open it now?'
'Tissue boxes are much more amazing when you open them from the side. I thought I should act swiftly.'
'Nope. I still don't get it. Why would you open a tissue box?'
'You seriously don't know why human beings open tissue boxes?'

EDIT: And here I thought this was quite a cool idea, something noone would have ever thought of. This is only the third cross-over between Kaiji and the SnK opening. Well, that's if there are no others versions that I don't know of yet. Damn it. I HATE IT!
